tools.notes: Filled after 3D modeling but before drafting. Compares physical field measurements against CAD model dimensions. Any Fail status blocks drafting until corrected.
Feature reconstruction log for reverse engineering projects. Each row tracks a component from source data through to validated CAD model. References T3.D1.8a field log for validation.

fields.name: all_features_reconstructed
fields.label: All components reconstructed and validated against field log?

tools.notes: Engineering Drawing and Document Management System project hub. Defines CAD master file, team, part/assembly count, and phase deadlines. Set up once per project at the start of WB06.

Per-component drafting status matrix. Tracks each part and assembly through 7 drafting phases (Representation, Presentation, Sheet Metal, Placement, BOM/Lists, Dimensioning, Notes). Overall Status and QA Reviewer assigned per component.
Final internal QA before TDP is sent to client (D6.1). One row per drawing per focus area checked. Any Fail blocks client dispatch until resolved. Used by both T1 and T3 paths.

fields.name: all_issues_closed
fields.label: All identified issues resolved and closed?

tools.notes: Formal record of TDP delivery to client. Lists every file in the package with its format, secure link, and QA verification status. Triggers the client review clock.
Schedules the design presentation meeting with the client. Contains a standard invite email script and meeting agenda. Calendar invite must be sent before D6.3 can be created.

fields.name: invite_script
fields.label: Invite Email Script
fields.content:
Dear [Client Name],

Following the delivery of your preliminary design package, we would like to formally present the engineering designs and gather your structured feedback.

Please review the Technical Data Package sent via D6.1 before our session.

Agenda:
1. Design Walkthrough & Key Decisions (20 mins)
2. Open Questions & Client Concerns (15 mins)
3. Formal Feedback Collection (10 mins)

Please confirm your attendance at your earliest convenience.

[PM Name] | IMHOGEN LTD

fields.name: calendar_invite_sent
fields.label: Calendar invite sent to all required attendees?

tools.notes: Captures live client reactions and feedback during the design presentation. Each comment is logged with IMHOGEN's live response. Feeds into D6.4 for formal revision requests.
Completed by the client. Captures formal, structured revision requests with business justification and priority. The authorised client signatory must sign. Feeds into D6.5 and D6.6.
Internal PM tracker for all revision requests from D6.3 and D6.4. Tracks status of each revision: Pending / Approved / Rejected / Aborted. PM must classify before D6.6 scope assessment.

For each revision in D6.5, determines if it is within the original contract scope (D2.12). Out-of-scope changes trigger a change order. PM must sign off before engineering revision tickets (D6.7) are issued.
Formal CAD work orders issued to the engineering team based on approved revisions from D6.6. Each ticket specifies the assigned engineer, required CAD tool, task description, hours, and status.

Version-controlled manifest of the revised TDP. Lists every file in the updated package with version number and vault link. Supersedes the previous D6.1 dispatch. Goes to D6.9 for internal QA before re-dispatch.
Internal QA gate before re-dispatching revised TDP to client. Head of Engineering verifies each D6.7 ticket was executed correctly. Any Fail blocks re-dispatch.

fields.name: qa_checklist
fields.label: Verification Points
prefilled_rows: Do the updated CAD files explicitly match the exact requests from D6.7?
Have all previous QA failures from D6.5.4 been resolved?
Are all BOM items updated to reflect revision changes?
Is the new TDP version number correctly applied to all files?

tools.notes: Client formally accepts the TDP and signs to confirm the design is approved. This is the CAD Lock document. Once signed, all native CAD files are set to read-only. Unlocks D6.11.

fields.name: acceptance_declaration
fields.label: Acceptance Terms
fields.content:
By signing this document, the Client formally acknowledges and agrees:
1. The engineering design, as represented in the TDP, meets all functional and technical requirements in the original Project Brief.
2. No further design revisions will be requested under the current contract terms.
3. IMHOGEN LTD is formally authorized to proceed to the next project phase (Fabrication / Delivery).

fields.name: client_accepts_design
fields.label: Client formally accepts the design and authorises next phase?

tools.notes: T3 equivalent of D6.10. Client confirms drawing dimensions and specs are correct. Asset release checklist confirms all deliverables (PDFs, DXFs, native files) are released to the correct storage location.

Final tool in WB06. Confirms CAD lock actions are complete and unlocks the next phase (WB07 Procurement or WB08 Fabrication depending on project type). Signing off sets projects.status = 'Fabrication Phase'.

fields.name: closure_checklist
fields.label: Closure Actions
prefilled_rows: All native CAD files locked to Read-Only to prevent accidental edits
Final Bill of Materials (BOM) exported for Procurement
All design files backed up to project vault
D6.10 client acceptance form filed in project archive
